def test_real_flow_track_refresh(self, library_db): from PySide6.QtCore import QCoreApplication QCoreApplication.instance() or QCoreApplication() conn, db_path = library_db total = self._populate(conn) db = self._make_db_mock(conn, db_path) from ui_qml_bridge.query_executor import QueryExecutor from ui_qml_bridge.library_query_service import LibraryQueryService from ui_qml.models.TrackListModel import TrackListModel qe = QueryExecutor() qs = LibraryQueryService(db, db_path=str(db_path)) model = TrackListModel(query_service=qs, query_executor=qe) assert model.count == 0 assert model.loading is False model.refresh() assert model.loading is False # sync fallback > assert model.totalCount == total E assert 0 == 1000 E + where 0 = <ui_qml.models.TrackListModel.TrackListModel(0x7fd990367050) at 0x7fd99fe04f00>.totalCount

def test_real_flow_search(self, library_db): from ui_qml_bridge.query_executor import QueryExecutor from ui_qml_bridge.library_query_service import LibraryQueryService from ui_qml.models.TrackListModel import TrackListModel conn, db_path = library_db self._populate(conn) db = self._make_db_mock(conn, db_path) qe = QueryExecutor() qs = LibraryQueryService(db, db_path=str(db_path)) model = TrackListModel(query_service=qs, query_executor=qe) search_term = "Track_5" model.refresh(search=search_term) assert model.loading is False > assert model.totalCount > 0 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = <ui_qml.models.TrackListModel.TrackListModel(0x55bd7646bcf0) at 0x7fd99f9e6980>.totalCount

testcase.name: test_real_flow_album_play

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd99cd57b40>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd99cd57b40> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'NO_TRACKS'}.get

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_wave9_vertical_end_to_end.TestWave10RealVerticalFlow object at 0x7fd9a05a9ad0> library_db = (<sqlite3.Connection object at 0x7fd99c37e200>, PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-cristian/pytest-148/test_real_flow_album_play0/test_music.db'))
def test_real_flow_album_play(self, library_db): from PySide6.QtCore import QCoreApplication QCoreApplication.instance() or QCoreApplication() conn, db_path = library_db self._populate(conn) db = self._make_db_mock(conn, db_path) from core.worker_manager import WorkerManager from ui_qml_bridge.query_executor import QueryExecutor from ui_qml_bridge.library_query_service import LibraryQueryService from ui_qml_bridge.library_bridge import LibraryBridge wm = WorkerManager() qe = QueryExecutor(worker_manager=wm) qs = LibraryQueryService(db, db_path=str(db_path))
class FakePlayer: def __init__(s): s.enqueued = [] def enqueue(s, paths, play_now=False): s.enqueued = list(paths)
player = FakePlayer() bridge = LibraryBridge(db=db, playback_ctrl=player, query_service=qs, query_executor=qe) result = bridge.playAlbum("key_0_0") > assert result.get("ok") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd99cd57b40>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd99cd57b40> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'NO_TRACKS'}.get
tests/qml/test_wave9_vertical_end_to_end.py:670: AssertionError
